name: Europa (The Arcos Estate)
description: A frozen moon of Jupiter, home to the retired Rage Knight, Lorn au Arcos. Guarded by genetically engineered griffins.
gm_instructions: Lorn lives here. If players somehow reach Europa, Lorn will test them on why they fight before offering any help or wisdom.

name: Olympus (Mars Institute)
description: A floating citadel hovering above the terraformed valleys of the Mars Institute. From here, the Proctors, including Fitchner (Proctor Apollo/Mars), watch the Gold students.
gm_instructions: Fitchner operates from here. Do not let players reach Olympus unless it's the campaign finale. It is heavily guarded by Praetorians and PulseArmor-clad Grays.

name: Lykos Mine
description: A massive, subterranean helium-3 mine under the surface of Mars. The lowReds here sing the "Song of Persephone" and work the clawDrills.
gm_instructions: This is where Darrow currently lives as a child. He is forbidden from the campaign, but Lykos can be mentioned as a particularly harsh Augustus holding.

name: The Bleeding Place
description: A formal, white-sand arena used for honor duels between Golds using razors. Presided over by a White Arbiter.
gm_instructions: Any dispute settled here is legally binding in Society law. A "Chance" pours the sand and snaps the elm rod to begin the duel.

name: The Pandemonium Chair Room
description: A nightmare laboratory deep in the Spire on Luna, used by the Sovereign (Octavia) to selectively wipe or alter memories.
gm_instructions: A horrific fate for any captured Sons operative. A threat the Weaver uses to enforce operational security.
